ui.welcome: Welcome. Select an assessment to begin.
ui.question: Question
ui.helpText: If you are going through an emotional crisis, seek professional help. National Suicide Prevention Lifeline: 988 (US) or contact a mental health professional.
ui.disclaimerText: This test is a self-assessment tool and does not replace a mental health professional's diagnosis. If you feel you need help, please consult a specialist.
ui.privacyText: Your results are stored only in your browser (localStorage). No data is sent to any server or leaves your computer.
ui.completeFirst: Complete at least one test to see the history.
ui.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all history? This action cannot be undone.
ui.disclaimer: This tool is for informational purposes only and does not replace a professional evaluation. Consult a mental health specialist for a proper diagnosis.
ui.resumePrompt: You have a test in progress
ui.resumeMessage: You have a {test} test in progress ({n}/{total} questions)
